diagrams.title: Ethernet Frame Structure
diagrams.description: Complete breakdown of Ethernet II frame with all fields and byte sizes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding frame composition and minimum/maximum sizes

diagrams.title: CSMA/CD Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process of Carrier Sense Multiple Access with Collision Detection
elements: If collision: Send jam signal, stop, wait random backoff
Backoff: Increment collision count, calculate wait, retry (max 16 times)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how Ethernet handles shared medium access and collisions

diagrams.title: CSMA/CA RTS/CTS Exchange
diagrams.description: Handshake mechanism used in wireless networks to avoid hidden node problem
elements: Station A sends RTS to AP
Station B receives CTS (cannot hear A's RTS)
Station A receives CTS, begins data transmission
Other stations wait during data transfer
diagrams.purpose: Understanding collision avoidance in wireless networks
